title: MidoMika-SiegeSafe BaseShield Plugin
description: MidoMika-SiegeSafe BaseShield Plugin is a revolutionary Minecraft plugin designed to elevate your base protection strategy. With this plugin, you can fortify your base to provide an extra layer of defense against potential threats.
body:
MidoMika-SiegeSafe BaseShield Plugin is a revolutionary Minecraft plugin designed to elevate your base protection strategy. With this plugin, you can fortify your base to provide an extra layer of defense against potential threats.





  • Material-dependent Shield Hardness: The plugin takes into account the materials used in your base construction. For example, if you build with iron, your base will have a significantly stronger shield compared to one made from wood. This encourages players to invest in stronger building materials for enhanced protection.
  • Real-time Notifications: MidoMika-SiegeSafe BaseShield keeps you informed and on guard. If another player attempts to damage or break in your base, you will receive notification, giving you a chance to defend your territory before any loss occurs.
  • Shield Generation: Upon constructing your base, you can select whole base area and initiates the shield generation process. This protective shield acts as an invisible barrier, absorbing damage and preventing immediate destruction. This adds a strategic element to base defense, allowing you time to respond to threats.
  • HP Bar: When you attempt to damage another player's base, MidoMika- SiegeSafe BaseShield will display their BaseShield's real-time HP bar. This visual indicator allows you to track the shield's health, giving you insight into when the shield can be broken. This feature ensures you have the information how you need to plan your attack effectively.
  • Base Access Grant for Friend: With the upcoming feature, you'll be able to grant access to your base for friends. This added flexibility allows you to strategically collaborate with allies in defending and maintaining your territory.
  • For the owner, your base's shield will gradually recover as long as it hasn't been completely destroyed. You have the flexibility to set the length of the recovery time according to your preferences. Additionally, as the owner, you will receive notifications for significant events related to your base's shield: when it's damaged, fully recovered, or if it's completely destroyed and gone. This ensures that you're always aware of the state of your base's protection. In the event that your base's shield is completely depleted, you will need to initiate a reset process to restore it to full functionality. This provides a safeguard against total vulnerability and encourages proactive management of your base's defenses.





They are total in 3 commands in this plugin, you can always type </ssbs > to check the commands content.
  1. After constructing your base, envision your base shield as a cuboid. Take a stick and left- click at the imagined cuboid's top-left corner to set your first point. Then, right-click at the opposite corner (bottom-right) of the imagined base shield. Type: /ssbs save <your SSBase name>. This process will successfully establish your base shield.

  2. By default, each player can set up three SSBS at a time. You can check your SSBS list by typing: /ssbs list. When your character is holding a stick, all set base shield points will appear as a gold border. Adjust the SSBS limit by editing the configuration settings.

  3. To delete any SSBS, use the command: /ssbs delete <specific SSBase name you want to delete>. This action will remove the specified base shield.






When your base is under attack or being damaged, the SSBS owner will receive these notifications.

Enemy view when trying to destroy the SSBS. After breaking and depleting the base shield’s HP bar, the notification will inform you “Successfully breakthrough the shield!”. And now, you can cause damage to someone else’s base.

As long as your SSBS has not been completely destroyed, it can self-repair after a certain period. You can adjust the duration for self-repair by editing the configuration settings.

After setting up the base shield, only the owner who activated the shield can access the mechanisms within, including doors, windows, chests, and buttons. The owner has the ability to open doors to allow other players get into the base, but the base shield remains active, preventing other players from interacting with any mechanisms.
Even if players enter the base, they are still unable to open chests or use any mechanisms. Should they attempt to break out from within, the base shield's HP bar will appear, similar to the outside scenario. They will need to break down the base shield to exit.

TNT can be used to damage and destroy SSBS. With the SiegeSafe BaseShield plugin, you can fortify your base to provide an extra layer of defence against potential threats. If you enjoy my project and appreciate SPM plugins, you can show your support by visiting https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/MidoMika. Your contributions enable me to develop more engaging SMP plugins and enhance your Minecraft experience. Thank you for your support!
